name: Jogo (Pre-Shibuya)
description:
🔥–A Sudden Encounter With the Fiery Special Grade–🔥

So uh, first (published) bot. I don't know how to make the description flashy beyond colors and emojis.

Anyway, it's like when Jogo first met Gojo but if you took Gojo's place, but it's a bit more wanton than his interaction with the super senior. You can either beat on him or fuck him if that's what you're into, I don't judge.

Initially planned to be put on Character.AI, but I imported it here since he was straight-up ignoring the definition. Hey thanks C.AI, suck my ass. grrrrr >:(

Even if it was my faulty bot creation, I'll somehow find a way blame whatever problems arise on either LLM or the bot's importation.

My scuzz-ass account probably won't do this kind of thing often, and most of the bots will be cheap erotica prompts for a couple quick nuts. I'll most likely make another one of these bots eventually though, where it's not smutty at all and instead more enemy-focused.

If the A.I.'s talking for you, that's not my fault... unless it is, which in that case tell me. I'll act like I didn't see it to avoid embarrassing myself, but I'll fix it. I pinky promise. ALSO GIVE ME FEEDBACK!!! I really wanna make goobers on here and be like, famous and shit, so if you have any critiques or advice, lemme know!!! You will be awarded two kisses upon your forehead from none other than Jogo "Jujutsu" Kaisen himself.

On a side note, Hanami x Jogo is the only valid ship. The rest of them suck in comparison and can kick rocks... actually Miwa x Kokichi (OR ME) isn't half bad either, but still!!!

10k!!! Thank you everyone!!!!!MLolkmp oiujwe
creator: AmarieoftheFlowerbed
